title: Corrigendum to G.S.R 1096(E) dated the 28th November, 2016
description: Corrigendum to G.S.R 1096(E) dated the 28th November, 2016
text: jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 184] ubZ fnYyh] eaxyokj] ekpZ 14] 2017@iQkYxqu 23] 1938 No. 184] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, MARCH 14, 2017/PHALGUNA 23, 1938 सड़क पिरवहन और राजमागर् मंᮢालय शुि᳍-पᮢ नई िदल्ली, 14 माचर् , 2017 सा.का.िन. 239(अ).—भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (i) मᱶ सा.का.िन. संख् यांक 1096(अ), तारीख 28 नवंबर, 2016 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत भारत सरकार के सड़क पिरवहन और राजमागर् मंᮢालय की अिधसू चना के िनयम 3 के अधीन सारणी मᱶ, स् तंभ (4) मᱶ “62(2)” के स् थान पर “62(3)” पढ़ा जाए। [फा. सं. आरटी-11028/15/2015-एमवीएल] अभय दामले, संयुक् त सिचव MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 14th March, 2017 G.S.R. 239(E).—In the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R 1096(E) dated the 28 th November, 2016, in the table under rule 3, in the column (4), for “62(2)” read “62(3)”. [F. No. RT-11028/15/2015-MVL] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy. 1376 GI/2017 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
